//: Dev/test tooling ONLY, for the hermetic Playwright e2e smoke suite under tests/e2e. The app itself has NO build step: it ships as static files in frontend/ (index.html plus plain <script> tags, no bundler). Nothing here is served to users or imported by the app; this file exists solely so CI and local dev can install @playwright/test. The frontend unit tests still run with a bare `node --test`, no dependencies.
name: nyc-transit-live-e2e
description: Hermetic Playwright smoke tests for the NYC Transit Live frontend (dev/test only; the app is buildless).
